items.question: What is Cross-modal Learning in one sentence?
items.answer: The ability of a model to learn from multiple modalities, such as vision and language. It sits inside Multi-Modal Learning / Data Integration. Start after Q-Learning and V-Learning.

items.question: What should I know before studying Cross-modal Learning?
items.answer: Start with Q-Learning and V-Learning.

items.question: What should I compare Cross-modal Learning with?
items.answer: Compare it with Cross-modal Fusion and Multi-modal Learning before moving on to .
